allow: Bash(python -c "from pypdf import PdfReader; r=PdfReader\('Informe_revision_codigo.pdf'\); print\('paginas:', len\(r.pages\)\); print\(r.pages[0].extract_text\(\)[:300]\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('dotenv:', p.dependencies.dotenv||p.devDependencies?.dotenv||'\(no directa\)'\); console.log\('@nestjs/config:', p.dependencies['@nestjs/config']\)")
Bash(node -e "process.env.TZ='UTC'; const d=new Date\('2026-06-15T10:00:00'\); console.log\('hours:', d.getHours\(\), 'offset:', d.getTimezoneOffset\(\)\);")
Bash(node -e "process.env.TZ='America/New_York'; const d=new Date\('2026-06-15T10:00:00'\); console.log\('hours:', d.getHours\(\), 'offset:', d.getTimezoneOffset\(\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=new Date\('2026-06-15T10:00:00'\); console.log\('hours:', d.getHours\(\), 'offset:', d.getTimezoneOffset\(\)\);")

Bash(APP_TIMEZONE=America/New_York node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); process.env.TZ=process.env.APP_TIMEZONE?.trim\(\)||process.env.TZ?.trim\(\)||'Europe/Madrid'; console.log\('TZ aplicada=',process.env.TZ, '| Date 10:00 ->', new Date\('2026-06-15T10:00:00'\).getHours\(\)+'h'\);")
